Run logs.

Notes:

  • We need more inspectability: In the UI, I should be able to inspect each thought, action, tool call, etc that the agent takes as its happening - via an expandable accordion menu.

  • When attempting to change topic on the prompt, it rightly caught it and steered back towards the dataset. This is good. It failed when generating 4 extra questions, though - the questions should be embedded inline in the chat as buttons for the user to select - no need for them to type it.

  • The chart generation and calculations as they are are black boxes. Need, as above, inspectability.

  • All citations (Be it the agent citing a review, or a result from a tool call e.g. calculation, needs to be inspectable - I should see an underline or read more or inline style citation button that i can click on and see a bullet proof source for the assertion the agent makes.

Tool reply2026-03-22T17:42:03.459Z
Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the codebase. Let me create a detailed summary report of my findings:

## Comprehensive ReviewLens Frontend Code Exploration

Based on my thorough analysis of the ReviewLens codebase, here are my complete findings:

---

### 1. **templates/app.html** (Full Contents Available)
**File Path:** `/Users/shaynelarocque/Documents/GitHub/futuresight/reviewlens/templates/app.html` (372 lines)

**Key Findings:**

- **Message Rendering:** Messages are rendered via Jinja2 templating with role-based styling (user vs. assistant). Initial messages from the server include raw HTML that gets inserted into the DOM.
- **SSE Event Handling:** There is NO current SSE event handler in the HTML; SSE is handled entirely in JavaScript (app.js).
- **Charts Display:** Charts are rendered as inline `<canvas>` elements with accompanying `<script>` tags that call the `renderChart()` function. These are server-side HTML with inline scripts.
- **Follow-ups Display:** Follow-up buttons are rendered server-side via the `_render_message()` function in `app/main.py`. They appear in a `<div class="follow-ups">` container with buttons that have `onclick="sendFollowUp(this)"` and `data-question` attributes.
- **Welcome State:** When no messages exist, the template shows a welcome message with initial follow-up suggestions hardcoded in the HTML.
- **Thinking Indicator:** Uses three animated dots `.thinking-dots` (CSS animation `pulse-bar`).
- **Tool Activity Display:** Not displayed in HTML itself; handled via JavaScript SSE listener that updates the thinking indicator with tool information.

**No accordion/expandable patterns exist** in the HTML template.

---

### 2. **static/app.js** (Full Contents: 528 lines)

**Key Findings:**

**SSE Event Handling (lines 304-363):**
```javascript
eventSource.addEventListener("tool", function (e) {
    var thinking = document.getElementById("thinking-indicator");
    if (thinking) {
      var content = thinking.querySelector(".message-content");
      content.innerHTML =
        '<div class="thinking-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>' +
        '<div class="tool-activity">' + escapeHtml(e.data) + "</div>";
      scrollToBottom();
    }
});
```
- **"tool" events** are logged and display inside the thinking indicator message as `.tool-activity` text
- The tool activity text is monospaced, small (0.7rem), and shows truncated with ellipsis
- This is the only current UI for tool events (no separate indicator outside thinking message)

**Message Rendering:**
- User messages are created with `escapeHtml()` for security
- Assistant messages come from SSE "message" event and are inserted as raw HTML
- A mutation observer auto-scrolls the chat as messages arrive

**Chart Rendering (lines 410-478):**
- Charts are rendered client-side via Chart.js library
- Function `renderChart(canvasId, config)` is called from inline scripts
- Colors adapt to light/dark theme via `getChartTextColor()` and `getChartGridColor()`
- Script elements in messages are detected and executed via `runChartScripts()` which runs `eval()` on script content
- Charts include title, responsive layout, and grid styling

**Follow-up Buttons:**
- `sendFollowUp(btn)` extracts the `data-question` attribute and sends it as a message
- Follow-up buttons have class `.follow-up-btn` with pill-shaped styling (border-radius: 999px)

**Thinking Indicator:**
- Created with `.thinking` class containing `.thinking-dots` with three animated spans
- Uses `pulse-bar` animation (staggered timing: 0s, 0.2s, 0.4s delays)
- Removed via `removeThinking()` when "message" event arrives

**No accordion/expandable patterns exist** in the JavaScript.

---

### 3. **static/style.css** (Full Contents: 1159 lines)

**Key Style Definitions:**

**Thinking Indicator (lines 700-738):**
```css
.thinking .message-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    min-width: 100px;
}

.thinking-dots {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 3px;
    height: 18px;
}

.thinking-dots span {
    width: 24px;
    height: 3px;
    background: var(--accent);
    border-radius: 2px;
    animation: pulse-bar 1.6s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.thinking-dots span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
.thinking-dots span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }

.tool-activity {
    font-family: var(--mono);
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    color: var(--text-3);
    max-width: 340px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
}
```

**Charts (lines 739-751):**
```css
.chart-container {
    margin: 0.75rem 0;
    padding: 1rem;
    background: var(--bg-2);
    border: 1px solid var(--bg-3);
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    max-width: 480px;
}
```

**Follow-ups (lines 752-783):**
```css
.follow-ups {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
}

.follow-up-btn {
    background: var(--accent-dim);
    color: var(--accent);
    border: 1px solid rgba(45, 212, 191, 0.15);
    border-radius: 999px;  /* Pill shape */
    padding: 0.32rem 0.85rem;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
}
```

**Messages (lines 598-625):**
- User messages: right-aligned, dark background, rounded corners
- Assistant messages: left-aligned, bordered, with markdown-styled content

**Animation (lines 106-109):**
```css
@keyframes pulse-bar {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 0.4; transform: scaleX(0.6); }
    50%      { opacity: 1; transform: scaleX(1); }
}
```

**No accordion patterns exist** in the CSS.

---

### 4. **app/main.py** — `_render_message()` Function (lines 429-465)

**Full Function Analysis:**

```python
def _render_message(msg: ChatMessage) -> str:
    role_class = "user-message" if msg.role == "user" else "assistant-message"
    escaped = html_module.escape(msg.content)

    if msg.role == "assistant":
        content_html = markdown.markdown(
            msg.content,
            extensions=["tables", "fenced_code"],
        )
    else:
        content_html = f"<p>{escaped}</p>"

    parts = [f'<div class="message {role_class}">']
    parts.append(f'<div class="message-content">{content_html}</div>')

    # CHARTS: Rendered server-side with inline script
    for i, chart in enumerate(msg.charts):
        chart_id = f"chart-{uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]}"
        parts.append(
            f'<div class="chart-container">'
            f'<canvas id="{chart_id}"></canvas>'
            f'<script>renderChart("{chart_id}", {json.dumps(chart)});</script>'
            f'</div>'
        )

    # FOLLOW-UPS: Rendered server-side
    if msg.follow_ups:
        parts.append('<div class="follow-ups">')
        for q in msg.follow_ups:
            escaped_q = html_module.escape(q)
            parts.append(
                f'<button class="follow-up-btn" onclick="sendFollowUp(this)" '
                f'data-question="{escaped_q}">{escaped_q}</button>'
            )
        parts.append('</div>')

    parts.append('</div>')
    return "\n".join(parts)
```

**Key Points:**
- **Content:** Markdown-rendered for assistant messages, plain text for user messages
- **Charts:** Server-side HTML with inline Chart.js rendering scripts
- **Follow-ups:** Server-side HTML with escaped question text in `data-question` attribute
- **Source:** Charts and follow-ups come from `msg.charts` and `msg.follow_ups` lists populated by the agent

---

### 5. **SSE Stream Handling** (app/main.py, lines 402-425)

```python
@app.get("/chat/{session_id}/stream")
async def chat_stream(session_id: str):
    async def event_generator():
        queue = _get_queue(session_id)
        event = _get_response_event(session_id)

        while True:
            while queue:
                item = queue.popleft()
                yield {"event": item["event"], "data": item["data"]}
                if item["event"] == "message":
                    yield {"event": "done", "data": ""}
                    return

            if event.is_set() and not queue:
                yield {"event": "done", "data": ""}
                return

            await asyncio.sleep(0.15)

    return EventSourceResponse(event_generator())
```

**Event Flow:**
1. **"tool" events** - Emitted during agent tool execution (from `app/tools.py` via `await emit_fn()`)
2. **"message" events** - The final assistant response HTML from `_render_message()`
3. **"done" events** - Signals stream completion

---

### 6. **Tool Event Emission** (app/tools.py)

**Pattern used across all tools:**
```python
await emit_fn(
    session_id,
    f"Searched reviews: \"{query}\" — {len(results)} results",
    "tool",
)
```

**Where tools emit:**
- `search_reviews_tool` (line 74-78)
- `analyze_sentiment_tool` (line 133-137)
- `generate_chart_tool` (line 213-217)
- `calculate_stats_tool` (line 338-342)
- `suggest_follow_ups_tool` (line 375-379)
- `list_knowledge_files_tool` (line 408-412)
- `read_knowledge_file_tool` (line 464-468)
- `save_to_report_tool` (line 518-522)
- `get_report_tool` (line 554-558)
- `check_scope_tool` (line 641-645)

**Current UI Display:** Tool text appears ONLY inside the thinking indicator as `.tool-activity` text (monospaced, small, truncated with ellipsis).

---

### 7. **Charts & Follow-ups Origin** (app/agent.py, lines 111-130)

**PostToolUse Hook - Intercepts tool results:**
```python
async def post_tool_hook(input_data, tool_use_id, context):
    """Intercept tool results to extract charts and follow-ups."""
    try:
        result = context.get("result", {})
        content = result.get("content", [])
        for block in content:
            if block.get("type") == "text":
                data = json.loads(block["text"])
                if "chart" in data:
                    charts.append(data["chart"])
                if "follow_ups" in data:
                    follow_ups.extend(data["follow_ups"])
    except (json.JSONDecodeError, KeyError, TypeError):
        pass
    return {}
```

**Flow:**
1. Tools return JSON with `"chart"` and/or `"follow_ups"` keys in their response
2. Hook extracts and accumulates these into lists
3. Final `ChatMessage` object includes `charts` and `follow_ups` lists
4. `_render_message()` renders them as HTML

---

### 8. **Current UI Architecture Summary**

| Element | Rendering | Positioning | Styling |
|---------|-----------|------------|---------|
| **Messages** | Server-side HTML | Chat flow | `.message`, `.user-message`, `.assistant-message` |
| **Thinking Indicator** | Client-side JS | Floating in chat | `.thinking`, `.thinking-dots` |
| **Tool Activity** | Client-side JS (SSE) | Inside thinking message | `.tool-activity` (monospaced, small, truncated) |
| **Charts** | Server-side HTML + inline script | After message content | `.chart-container` with Canvas.js config |
| **Follow-ups** | Server-side HTML | Below message content | `.follow-ups` container, `.follow-up-btn` (pill buttons) |
| **Accordions** | **NONE EXIST** | N/A | N/A |

---

### Key Observations:

1. **Tool events are currently subtle** — they only appear as small truncated text inside the thinking indicator (no separate indicator or badge)
2. **Charts are server-rendered with inline scripts** — easy to add and remove dynamically
3. **Follow-ups are server-rendered** — extracted from tool responses and attached to ChatMessage
4. **No expandable/accordion UI patterns** currently exist in the codebase
5. **SSE is event-driven** — tool events stream in real-time as agent executes tools
6. **Light/dark theme support** — All colors use CSS variables that adapt based on `.light` class on `<html>`

---

**File Paths Summary:**
- `/Users/shaynelarocque/Documents/GitHub/futuresight/reviewlens/templates/app.html`
- `/Users/shaynelarocque/Documents/GitHub/futuresight/reviewlens/static/app.js`
- `/Users/shaynelarocque/Documents/GitHub/futuresight/reviewlens/static/style.css`

- `/Users/shaynelarocque/Documents/GitHub/futuresight/reviewlens/app/agent.py`

Tool reply2026-03-22T17:42:14.148Z
     1→/* ReviewLens AI */
     2→
     3→// ── Logging ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     4→
     5→var _log = {
     6→  info: function () { console.log("[RL]", ...arguments); },
     7→  warn: function () { console.warn("[RL]", ...arguments); },
     8→  error: function () { console.error("[RL]", ...arguments); },
     9→};
    10→
    11→// ── Theme ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    12→
    13→(function initTheme() {
    14→  var saved = localStorage.getItem("rl-theme");
    15→  if (saved === "light") {
    16→    document.documentElement.classList.add("light");
    17→  } else if (saved === "dark") {
    18→    document.documentElement.classList.remove("light");
    19→  } else if (window.matchMedia("(prefers-color-scheme: light)").matches) {
    20→    document.documentElement.classList.add("light");
    21→  }
    22→})();
    23→
    24→function toggleTheme() {
    25→  var html = document.documentElement;
    26→  html.classList.toggle("light");
    27→  localStorage.setItem("rl-theme", html.classList.contains("light") ? "light" : "dark");
    28→}
    29→
    30→// ── Modal ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    31→
    32→function openModal() {
    33→  document.getElementById("modal-backdrop").classList.add("open");
    34→  document.getElementById("analysis-modal").classList.add("open");
    35→}
    36→
    37→function closeModal() {
    38→  document.getElementById("modal-backdrop").classList.remove("open");
    39→  document.getElementById("analysis-modal").classList.remove("open");
    40→}
    41→
    42→function switchTab(btn, tabId) {
    43→  var tabs = btn.parentElement.querySelectorAll(".modal-tab");
    44→  tabs.forEach(function (t) { t.classList.remove("active"); });
    45→  btn.classList.add("active");
    46→
    47→  var contents = btn.closest(".modal").querySelectorAll(".modal-tab-content");
    48→  contents.forEach(function (c) { c.classList.remove("active"); });
    49→  document.getElementById(tabId).classList.add("active");
    50→}
    51→
    52→document.addEventListener("keydown", function (e) {
    53→  if (e.key === "Escape") closeModal();
    54→});
    55→
    56→// ── Session menu ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    57→
    58→function toggleSessionMenu(e, btn) {
    59→  e.preventDefault();
    60→  e.stopPropagation();
    61→  var wrap = btn.closest(".session-menu-wrap");
    62→  var wasOpen = wrap.classList.contains("open");
    63→
    64→  document.querySelectorAll(".session-menu-wrap.open").forEach(function (el) {
    65→    el.classList.remove("open");
    66→  });
    67→
    68→  if (!wasOpen) wrap.classList.add("open");
    69→}
    70→
    71→function archiveSession(e, sessionId) {
    72→  e.preventDefault();
    73→  e.stopPropagation();
    74→  _log.info("Archiving session:", sessionId);
    75→  fetch("/api/sessions/" + sessionId, { method: "DELETE" })
    76→    .then(function (r) {
    77→      if (r.ok) {
    78→        var wrap = document.querySelector(".session-menu-wrap.open");
    79→        if (wrap) {
    80→          var item = wrap.closest(".session-item-wrap");
    81→          item.style.transition = "opacity 0.2s, max-height 0.2s";
    82→          item.style.opacity = "0";
    83→          item.style.maxHeight = item.offsetHeight + "px";
    84→          item.style.overflow = "hidden";
    85→          setTimeout(function () { item.style.maxHeight = "0"; }, 10);
    86→          setTimeout(function () {
    87→            item.remove();
    88→            if (window.location.pathname.indexOf(sessionId) !== -1) {
    89→              window.location.href = "/";
    90→            }
    91→          }, 220);
    92→        }
    93→      }
    94→    });
    95→}
    96→
    97→document.addEventListener("click", function () {
    98→  document.querySelectorAll(".session-menu-wrap.open").forEach(function (el) {
    99→    el.classList.remove("open");
   100→  });
   101→});
   102→
   103→document.querySelectorAll(".session-menu-wrap").forEach(function (wrap) {
   104→  var leaveTimer = null;
   105→  wrap.addEventListener("mouseleave", function () {
   106→    leaveTimer = setTimeout(function () { wrap.classList.remove("open"); }, 300);
   107→  });
   108→  wrap.addEventListener("mouseenter", function () {
   109→    if (leaveTimer) { clearTimeout(leaveTimer); leaveTimer = null; }
   110→  });
   111→});
   112→
   113→// ── File upload drag & drop ─────────────────────────────────────────
   114→
   115→(function () {
   116→  var dropZone = document.getElementById("file-drop");
   117→  var fileInput = document.getElementById("file");
   118→  if (!dropZone || !fileInput) return;
   119→
   120→  dropZone.addEventListener("click", function () { fileInput.click(); });
   121→
   122→  dropZone.addEventListener("dragover", function (e) {
   123→    e.preventDefault();
   124→    dropZone.classList.add("drag-over");
   125→  });
   126→
   127→  dropZone.addEventListener("dragleave", function () {
   128→    dropZone.classList.remove("drag-over");
   129→  });
   130→
   131→  dropZone.addEventListener("drop", function (e) {
   132→    e.preventDefault();
   133→    dropZone.classList.remove("drag-over");
   134→    if (e.dataTransfer.files.length) {
   135→      fileInput.files = e.dataTransfer.files;
   136→      showFileName(e.dataTransfer.files[0].name);
   137→    }
   138→  });
   139→
   140→  fileInput.addEventListener("change", function () {
   141→    if (fileInput.files.length) showFileName(fileInput.files[0].name);
   142→  });
   143→
   144→  function showFileName(name) {
   145→    var content = dropZone.querySelector(".file-drop-content");
   146→    var selected = dropZone.querySelector(".file-selected");
   147→    var nameEl = dropZone.querySelector(".file-name");
   148→    content.style.display = "none";
   149→    selected.style.display = "flex";
   150→    nameEl.textContent = name;
   151→  }
   152→})();
   153→
   154→function clearFile() {
   155→  var dropZone = document.getElementById("file-drop");
   156→  var fileInput = document.getElementById("file");
   157→  var content = dropZone.querySelector(".file-drop-content");
   158→  var selected = dropZone.querySelector(".file-selected");
   159→  content.style.display = "";
   160→  selected.style.display = "none";
   161→  fileInput.value = "";
   162→}
   163→
   164→// ── HTMX loading states ─────────────────────────────────────────────
   165→
   166→document.addEventListener("htmx:beforeRequest", function (e) {
   167→  var form = e.detail.elt;
   168→  var btn = form.querySelector("button[type=submit]");
   169→  if (btn) {
   170→    btn.disabled = true;
   171→    var text = btn.querySelector(".btn-text");
   172→    var spinner = btn.querySelector(".btn-spinner");
   173→    if (text) text.style.display = "none";
   174→    if (spinner) spinner.style.display = "inline-flex";
   175→  }
   176→});
   177→
   178→document.addEventListener("htmx:afterRequest", function (e) {
   179→  var form = e.detail.elt;
   180→  var btn = form.querySelector("button[type=submit]");
   181→  if (btn) {
   182→    btn.disabled = false;
   183→    var text = btn.querySelector(".btn-text");
   184→    var spinner = btn.querySelector(".btn-spinner");
   185→    if (text) text.style.display = "";
   186→    if (spinner) spinner.style.display = "none";
   187→  }
   188→});
   189→
   190→// ── Chat ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   191→
   192→var chatMessages = document.getElementById("chat-messages");
   193→var chatInput = document.getElementById("chat-input");
   194→var chatForm = document.getElementById("chat-form");
   195→var sendBtn = document.getElementById("send-btn");
   196→var eventSource = null;
   197→var _sending = false;
   198→
   199→_log.info("Chat init — SESSION_ID:", typeof SESSION_ID !== "undefined" ? SESSION_ID : "(none)",
   200→          "chatForm:", !!chatForm, "chatInput:", !!chatInput);
   201→
   202→function scrollToBottom() {
   203→  if (chatMessages) chatMessages.scrollTop = chatMessages.scrollHeight;
   204→}
   205→
   206→if (chatInput) {
   207→  chatInput.addEventListener("input", function () {
   208→    this.style.height = "auto";
   209→    this.style.height = Math.min(this.scrollHeight, 150) + "px";
   210→  });
   211→
   212→  chatInput.addEventListener("keydown", function (e) {
   213→    if (e.key === "Enter" && !e.shiftKey) {
   214→      e.preventDefault();
   215→      _doSend();
   216→    }
   217→  });
   218→}
   219→
   220→// The form's onsubmit calls this
   221→function sendMessage(e) {
   222→  if (e) e.preventDefault();
   223→  _doSend();
   224→}
   225→
   226→function sendFollowUp(btn) {
   227→  var question = btn.getAttribute("data-question");
   228→  _log.info("Follow-up clicked:", question);
   229→  if (chatInput) {
   230→    chatInput.value = question;
   231→    _doSend();
   232→  }
   233→}
   234→
   235→function _doSend() {
   236→  if (!chatInput || !SESSION_ID) {
   237→    _log.error("Cannot send — chatInput:", !!chatInput, "SESSION_ID:", typeof SESSION_ID !== "undefined" ? SESSION_ID : "(undefined)");
   238→    return;
   239→  }
   240→  var message = chatInput.value.trim();
   241→  if (!message) {
   242→    _log.warn("Empty message, ignoring");
   243→    return;
   244→  }
   245→  if (_sending) {
   246→    _log.warn("Already sending, ignoring");
   247→    return;
   248→  }
   249→
   250→  _sending = true;
   251→  _log.info("Sending message:", message.substring(0, 80));
   252→
   253→  chatInput.disabled = true;
   254→  if (sendBtn) sendBtn.disabled = true;
   255→
   256→  // Remove old follow-ups
   257→  var old = chatMessages.querySelectorAll(".follow-ups");
   258→  old.forEach(function (el) { el.remove(); });
   259→
   260→  // User bubble
   261→  var userDiv = document.createElement("div");
   262→  userDiv.className = "message user-message";
   263→  userDiv.innerHTML = '<div class="message-content"><p>' + escapeHtml(message) + "</p></div>";
   264→  chatMessages.appendChild(userDiv);
   265→
   266→  // Thinking
   267→  var thinkingDiv = document.createElement("div");
   268→  thinkingDiv.id = "thinking-indicator";
   269→  thinkingDiv.className = "message assistant-message thinking";
   270→  thinkingDiv.innerHTML =
   271→    '<div class="message-content">' +
   272→    '<div class="thinking-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>' +
   273→    "</div>";
   274→  chatMessages.appendChild(thinkingDiv);
   275→  scrollToBottom();
   276→
   277→  var url = "/chat/" + SESSION_ID + "/send";
   278→  var formData = new FormData();
   279→  formData.append("message", message);
   280→
   281→  _log.info("POST", url);
   282→
   283→  fetch(url, { method: "POST", body: formData })
   284→    .then(function (resp) {
   285→      _log.info("POST response:", resp.status, resp.statusText);
   286→      if (!resp.ok) {
   287→        throw new Error("Server returned " + resp.status);
   288→      }
   289→      listenForResponse();
   290→    })
   291→    .catch(function (err) {
   292→      _log.error("POST failed:", err.name, err.message);
   293→      removeThinking();
   294→      appendError("Failed to send: " + err.message);
   295→      _sending = false;
   296→      chatInput.disabled = false;
   297→      if (sendBtn) sendBtn.disabled = false;
   298→    });
   299→
   300→  chatInput.value = "";
   301→  chatInput.style.height = "auto";
   302→}
   303→
   304→function listenForResponse() {
   305→  if (eventSource) {
   306→    _log.info("Closing existing EventSource");
   307→    eventSource.close();
   308→  }
   309→
   310→  var url = "/chat/" + SESSION_ID + "/stream";
   311→  _log.info("Opening SSE:", url);
   312→  eventSource = new EventSource(url);
   313→
   314→  eventSource.addEventListener("tool", function (e) {
   315→    _log.info("SSE tool event:", e.data);
   316→    var thinking = document.getElementById("thinking-indicator");
   317→    if (thinking) {
   318→      var content = thinking.querySelector(".message-content");
   319→      content.innerHTML =
   320→        '<div class="thinking-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>' +
   321→        '<div class="tool-activity">' + escapeHtml(e.data) + "</div>";
   322→      scrollToBottom();
   323→    }
   324→  });
   325→
   326→  eventSource.addEventListener("message", function (e) {
   327→    _log.info("SSE message event received (" + e.data.length + " chars)");
   328→    removeThinking();
   329→    var temp = document.createElement("div");
   330→    temp.innerHTML = e.data;
   331→    while (temp.firstChild) chatMessages.appendChild(temp.firstChild);
   332→    runChartScripts();
   333→    scrollToBottom();
   334→    _sending = false;
   335→    chatInput.disabled = false;
   336→    if (sendBtn) sendBtn.disabled = false;
   337→    chatInput.focus();
   338→  });
   339→
   340→  eventSource.addEventListener("done", function () {
   341→    _log.info("SSE done");
   342→    eventSource.close();
   343→    eventSource = null;
   344→    removeThinking();
   345→    _sending = false;
   346→    chatInput.disabled = false;
   347→    if (sendBtn) sendBtn.disabled = false;
   348→  });
   349→
   350→  eventSource.addEventListener("error", function (e) {
   351→    _log.error("SSE error event:", e);
   352→  });
   353→
   354→  eventSource.onerror = function (e) {
   355→    _log.error("SSE connection error — readyState:", eventSource.readyState);
   356→    eventSource.close();
   357→    eventSource = null;
   358→    removeThinking();
   359→    _sending = false;
   360→    chatInput.disabled = false;
   361→    if (sendBtn) sendBtn.disabled = false;
   362→  };
   363→}
   364→
   365→function removeThinking() {
   366→  var el = document.getElementById("thinking-indicator");
   367→  if (el) el.remove();
   368→}
   369→
   370→function appendError(msg) {
   371→  var div = document.createElement("div");
   372→  div.className = "message assistant-message error";
   373→  div.innerHTML = '<div class="message-content"><p>' + escapeHtml(msg) + "</p></div>";
   374→  chatMessages.appendChild(div);
   375→  scrollToBottom();
   376→}
   377→
   378→// ── Chart rendering ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
   379→
   380→var CHART_COLORS = [
   381→  "rgba(45, 212, 191, 0.75)",
   382→  "rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.75)",
   383→  "rgba(94, 234, 212, 0.65)",
   384→  "rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.7)",
   385→  "rgba(129, 140, 248, 0.7)",
   386→  "rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.7)",
   387→  "rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.7)",
   388→];
   389→
   390→var CHART_BORDERS = [
   391→  "rgba(45, 212, 191, 1)",
   392→  "rgba(245, 158, 11, 1)",
   393→  "rgba(94, 234, 212, 1)",
   394→  "rgba(248, 113, 113, 1)",
   395→  "rgba(129, 140, 248, 1)",
   396→  "rgba(52, 211, 153, 1)",
   397→  "rgba(251, 191, 36, 1)",
   398→];
   399→
   400→function getChartTextColor() {
   401→  return document.documentElement.classList.contains("light") ? "#374151" : "#b0bdd0";
   402→}
   403→
   404→function getChartGridColor() {
   405→  return document.documentElement.classList.contains("light")
   406→    ? "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06)"
   407→    : "rgba(107, 125, 153, 0.08)";
   408→}
   409→
   410→function renderChart(canvasId, config) {
   411→  var canvas = document.getElementById(canvasId);
   412→  if (!canvas) return;
   413→
   414→  var textColor = getChartTextColor();
   415→  var gridColor = getChartGridColor();
   416→
   417→  var datasets = config.data.datasets.map(function (ds, i) {
   418→    var isPie = config.type === "pie" || config.type === "doughnut";
   419→    var colors = isPie ? CHART_COLORS.slice(0, ds.data.length) : [CHART_COLORS[i % CHART_COLORS.length]];
   420→    var borders = isPie ? CHART_BORDERS.slice(0, ds.data.length) : [CHART_BORDERS[i % CHART_BORDERS.length]];
   421→
   422→    return {
   423→      label: ds.label,
   424→      data: ds.data,
   425→      backgroundColor: colors.length === 1 ? colors[0] : colors,
   426→      borderColor: borders.length === 1 ? borders[0] : borders,
   427→      borderWidth: config.type === "line" ? 2 : 1,
   428→      tension: 0.3,
   429→      fill: config.type === "line",
   430→    };
   431→  });
   432→
   433→  new Chart(canvas, {
   434→    type: config.type,
   435→    data: { labels: config.data.labels, datasets: datasets },
   436→    options: {
   437→      responsive: true,
   438→      maintainAspectRatio: true,
   439→      plugins: {
   440→        title: {
   441→          display: true,
   442→          text: config.title,
   443→          font: { size: 13, weight: "500", family: "'DM Sans', sans-serif" },
   444→          color: textColor,
   445→          padding: { bottom: 12 },
   446→        },
   447→        legend: {
   448→          labels: { color: textColor, font: { family: "'DM Sans', sans-serif", size: 11 } },
   449→        },
   450→      },
   451→      scales:
   452→        config.type !== "pie" && config.type !== "doughnut"
   453→          ? {
   454→              x: {
   455→                ticks: { color: textColor, font: { family: "'IBM Plex Mono', monospace", size: 10 } },
   456→                grid: { color: gridColor },
   457→              },
   458→              y: {
   459→                ticks: { color: textColor, font: { family: "'IBM Plex Mono', monospace", size: 10 } },
   460→                grid: { color: gridColor },
   461→                beginAtZero: true,
   462→              },
   463→            }
   464→          : undefined,
   465→    },
   466→  });
   467→}
   468→
   469→function runChartScripts() {
   470→  if (!chatMessages) return;
   471→  var scripts = chatMessages.querySelectorAll("script");
   472→  scripts.forEach(function (script) {
   473→    if (script.textContent.indexOf("renderChart") !== -1 && !script.dataset.executed) {
   474→      script.dataset.executed = "true";
   475→      eval(script.textContent);
   476→    }
   477→  });
   478→}
   479→
   480→// ── Utilities ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   481→
   482→function escapeHtml(str) {
   483→  var div = document.createElement("div");
   484→  div.appendChild(document.createTextNode(str));
   485→  return div.innerHTML;
   486→}
   487→
   488→if (chatMessages) {
   489→  var observer = new MutationObserver(scrollToBottom);
   490→  observer.observe(chatMessages, { childList: true, subtree: true });
   491→}
   492→
   493→scrollToBottom();
   494→
   495→// ── Scraping status poll ────────────────────────────────────────────
   496→
   497→(function () {
   498→  var scrapingView = document.getElementById("scraping-view");
   499→  if (!scrapingView || !SESSION_ID) return;
   500→
   501→  var stepNav = document.getElementById("step-navigating");
   502→  var stepIdx = document.getElementById("step-indexing");
   503→
   504→  setTimeout(function () {
   505→    if (stepNav) stepNav.classList.add("active");
   506→  }, 3000);
   507→
   508→  var poller = setInterval(function () {
   509→    fetch("/api/status/" + SESSION_ID)
   510→      .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
   511→      .then(function (data) {
   512→        _log.info("Scrape poll:", data.status);
   513→        if (data.status === "ready") {
   514→          if (stepNav) stepNav.classList.add("done");
   515→          if (stepIdx) { stepIdx.classList.add("active"); stepIdx.classList.add("done"); }
   516→          clearInterval(poller);
   517→          setTimeout(function () { window.location.reload(); }, 600);
   518→        } else if (data.status === "error") {
   519→          clearInterval(poller);
   520→          window.location.reload();
   521→        }
   522→      })
   523→      .catch(function () {});
   524→  }, 3000);
   525→
   526→  setTimeout(function () { clearInterval(poller); }, 360000);
   527→})();
   528→
Tool reply2026-03-22T17:42:14.337Z
     1→<!DOCTYPE html>
     2→<html lang="en">
     3→<head>
     4→    <meta charset="UTF-8">
     5→    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
     6→    <title>ReviewLens{% if summary %} — {{ summary.product_name }}{% endif %}</title>
     7→    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
     8→    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
     9→    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..40,300;0,9..40,400;0,9..40,500;0,9..40,600;1,9..40,400&family=Instrument+Serif:ital@0;1&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    10→    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/static/style.css">
    11→    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.7/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
    12→    <script src="https://unpkg.com/htmx.org@2.0.4"></script>
    13→</head>
    14→<body>
    15→    <div class="grain"></div>
    16→
    17→    <div class="app-layout">
    18→        <!-- ── Sidebar ──────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    19→        <aside class="sidebar">
    20→            <div class="sidebar-header">
    21→                <a href="/" class="logo-link">
    22→                    <svg class="logo-icon" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 32 32" fill="none">
    23→                        <circle cx="16" cy="16" r="14" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.4"/>
    24→                        <circle cx="16" cy="16" r="8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    25→                        <circle cx="16" cy="16" r="2.5" fill="currentColor"/>
    26→                    </svg>
    27→                    <span class="logo-text">Review<span class="serif-accent">Lens</span></span>
    28→                </a>
    29→                <button class="theme-toggle" onclick="toggleTheme()" title="Toggle light/dark">
    30→                    <svg class="icon-sun" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round">
    31→                        <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="5"/><line x1="12" y1="1" x2="12" y2="3"/><line x1="12" y1="21" x2="12" y2="23"/><line x1="4.22" y1="4.22" x2="5.64" y2="5.64"/><line x1="18.36" y1="18.36" x2="19.78" y2="19.78"/><line x1="1" y1="12" x2="3" y2="12"/><line x1="21" y1="12" x2="23" y2="12"/><line x1="4.22" y1="19.78" x2="5.64" y2="18.36"/><line x1="18.36" y1="5.64" x2="19.78" y2="4.22"/>
    32→                    </svg>
    33→                    <svg class="icon-moon" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round">
    34→                        <path d="M21 12.79A9 9 0 1 1 11.21 3 7 7 0 0 0 21 12.79z"/>
    35→                    </svg>
    36→                </button>
    37→            </div>
    38→
    39→            <button class="new-analysis-btn" onclick="openModal()">
    40→                <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round">
    41→                    <line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/>
    42→                </svg>
    43→                New Analysis
    44→            </button>
    45→
    46→            {% if session %}
    47→            <!-- Active session summary -->
    48→            <div class="sidebar-section">
    49→                <div class="section-label">Current Dataset</div>
    50→                <div class="active-dataset">
    51→                    <div class="dataset-name">{{ summary.product_name }}</div>
    52→                    <div class="dataset-meta">
    53→                        <span class="platform-tag">{{ summary.platform }}</span>
    54→                        <span class="dataset-stat">{{ summary.total_reviews }} reviews</span>
    55→                        {% if summary.average_rating %}
    56→                        <span class="dataset-stat">{{ "%.1f"|format(summary.average_rating) }} avg</span>
    57→                        {% endif %}
    58→                    </div>
    59→                    {% if summary.rating_distribution %}
    60→                    <div class="mini-dist">
    61→                        {% for star in ['5','4','3','2','1'] %}
    62→                        {% set count = summary.rating_distribution.get(star, 0) %}
    63→                        {% set pct = (count / summary.total_reviews * 100) if summary.total_reviews else 0 %}
    64→                        <div class="mini-dist-row">
    65→                            <span class="mini-dist-label">{{ star }}</span>
    66→                            <div class="mini-dist-track">
    67→                                <div class="mini-dist-fill" style="--w: {{ pct }}%"></div>
    68→                            </div>
    69→                            <span class="mini-dist-count">{{ count }}</span>
    70→                        </div>
    71→                        {% endfor %}
    72→                    </div>
    73→                    {% endif %}
    74→                </div>
    75→            </div>
    76→            {% endif %}
    77→
    78→            <!-- Chat history -->
    79→            <div class="sidebar-section sidebar-history">
    80→                <div class="section-label">History</div>
    81→                <nav class="session-list">
    82→                    {% for s in sessions %}
    83→                    <div class="session-item-wrap">
    84→                        <a href="/chat/{{ s.session_id }}"
    85→                           class="session-item{% if active_id == s.session_id %} active{% endif %}">
    86→                            <span class="session-name">{{ s.product_name or 'Untitled' }}</span>
    87→                            <span class="session-detail">{{ s.summary.total_reviews }} reviews &middot; {{ s.platform }}</span>
    88→                        </a>
    89→                        <div class="session-menu-wrap">
    90→                            <button class="session-menu-btn" onclick="toggleSessionMenu(event, this)" aria-label="Session options">
    91→                                <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor">
    92→                                    <circle cx="12" cy="5" r="2"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="2"/><circle cx="12" cy="19" r="2"/>
    93→                                </svg>
    94→                            </button>
    95→                            <div class="session-menu-dropdown">
    96→                                <button class="session-menu-action" onclick="archiveSession(event, '{{ s.session_id }}')">
    97→                                    <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
    98→                                        <polyline points="21 8 21 21 3 21 3 8"/><rect x="1" y="3" width="22" height="5"/><line x1="10" y1="12" x2="14" y2="12"/>
    99→                                    </svg>
   100→                                    Archive
   101→                                </button>
   102→                            </div>
   103→                        </div>
   104→                    </div>
   105→                    {% else %}
   106→                    <p class="empty-history">No analyses yet</p>
   107→                    {% endfor %}
   108→                </nav>
   109→            </div>
   110→        </aside>
   111→
   112→        <!-- ── Main Area ────────────────────────────────────────── -->
   113→        <main class="main-area">
   114→            {% if session and session.status == 'scraping' %}
   115→            <!-- Scraping in progress -->
   116→            <div class="scraping-view" id="scraping-view">
   117→                <div class="scraping-content">
   118→                    <div class="scraping-animation">
   119→                        <svg class="scraping-icon" width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 32 32" fill="none">
   120→                            <circle cx="16" cy="16" r="14" stroke="var(--accent)" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.2"/>
   121→                            <circle cx="16" cy="16" r="14" stroke="var(--accent)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="20 68" class="scraping-spinner"/>
   122→                        </svg>
   123→                    </div>
   124→                    <h3>Scraping reviews...</h3>
   125→                    <p class="scraping-detail">Firecrawl is navigating <strong>{{ session.platform }}</strong> to extract reviews for <strong>{{ session.product_name }}</strong>. This may take a few minutes for sites with pagination or anti-bot protection.</p>
   126→                    <div class="scraping-steps">
   127→                        <div class="step active">
   128→                            <span class="step-dot"></span>
   129→                            <span>Submitting to Firecrawl agent</span>
   130→                        </div>
   131→                        <div class="step" id="step-navigating">
   132→                            <span class="step-dot"></span>
   133→                            <span>Navigating pages &amp; extracting reviews</span>
   134→                        </div>
   135→                        <div class="step" id="step-indexing">
   136→                            <span class="step-dot"></span>
   137→                            <span>Indexing into vector database</span>
   138→                        </div>
   139→                    </div>
   140→                </div>
   141→            </div>
   142→
   143→            {% elif session and session.status == 'error' %}
   144→            <!-- Scraping failed -->
   145→            <div class="empty-state">
   146→                <svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--error)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round">
   147→                    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="15" y1="9" x2="9" y2="15"/><line x1="9" y1="9" x2="15" y2="15"/>
   148→                </svg>
   149→                <h2>Scraping failed</h2>
   150→                <p>Could not extract reviews from this URL. The site may be blocking automated access.</p>
   151→                <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openModal()" style="width:auto">Try Again</button>
   152→            </div>
   153→
   154→            {% elif session %}
   155→            <!-- Chat view -->
   156→            <div class="chat-messages" id="chat-messages">
   157→                {% for msg in messages %}
   158→                    {% if msg.role == 'assistant' %}
   159→                    <div class="message assistant-message">
   160→                        <div class="message-content">{{ msg.content }}</div>
   161→                    </div>
   162→                    {% else %}
   163→                    <div class="message user-message">
   164→                        <div class="message-content"><p>{{ msg.content }}</p></div>
   165→                    </div>
   166→                    {% endif %}
   167→                {% endfor %}
   168→
   169→                {% if not messages %}
   170→                <div class="message assistant-message welcome">
   171→                    <div class="message-content">
   172→                        <p>I have <strong>{{ summary.total_reviews }} reviews</strong> loaded for <strong>{{ summary.product_name }}</strong> from <strong>{{ summary.platform }}</strong>{% if summary.date_range %}, spanning <strong>{{ summary.date_range }}</strong>{% endif %}.</p>
   173→                        <p>I can only answer questions grounded in this dataset. What would you like to explore?</p>
   174→                    </div>
   175→                    <div class="follow-ups">
   176→                        <button class="follow-up-btn" onclick="sendFollowUp(this)" data-question="What's the overall sentiment breakdown?">Sentiment breakdown</button>
   177→                        <button class="follow-up-btn" onclick="sendFollowUp(this)" data-question="What are the most common complaints?">Top complaints</button>
   178→                        <button class="follow-up-btn" onclick="sendFollowUp(this)" data-question="Show me the rating distribution over time">Ratings over time</button>
   179→                        <button class="follow-up-btn" onclick="sendFollowUp(this)" data-question="What do people praise the most?">Most praised aspects</button>
   180→                    </div>
   181→                </div>
   182→                {% endif %}
   183→            </div>
   184→
   185→            <div class="chat-input-area">
   186→                <form id="chat-form" onsubmit="sendMessage(event); return false;">
   187→                    <div class="input-row">
   188→                        <textarea id="chat-input" name="message" placeholder="Ask about the reviews..." rows="1" autofocus></textarea>
   189→                        <button type="submit" class="btn-send" id="send-btn">
   190→                            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
   191→                                <line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/><polyline points="12 5 19 12 12 19"/>
   192→                            </svg>
   193→                        </button>
   194→                    </div>
   195→                </form>
   196→                <p class="input-hint">Analyses only the uploaded dataset. No external knowledge.</p>
   197→            </div>
   198→
   199→            {% else %}
   200→            <!-- Empty state -->
   201→            <div class="empty-state">
   202→                <svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="0 0 32 32" fill="none" class="empty-icon">
   203→                    <circle cx="16" cy="16" r="14" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
   204→                    <circle cx="16" cy="16" r="8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/>
   205→                    <circle cx="16" cy="16" r="2.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.6"/>
   206→                </svg>
   207→                <h2>ReviewLens <span class="serif-accent">AI</span></h2>
   208→                <p>Upload customer reviews and explore them through a guardrailed Q&A interface.</p>
   209→                <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openModal()">
   210→                    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round">
   211→                        <line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/>
   212→                    </svg>
   213→                    New Analysis
   214→                </button>
   215→            </div>
   216→            {% endif %}
   217→        </main>
   218→    </div>
   219→
   220→    <!-- ── New Analysis Modal ───────────────────────────────────── -->
   221→    <div class="modal-backdrop" id="modal-backdrop" onclick="closeModal()"></div>
   222→    <div class="modal" id="analysis-modal">
   223→        <div class="modal-header">
   224→            <h2>New Analysis</h2>
   225→            <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal()">&times;</button>
   226→        </div>
   227→
   228→        <div class="modal-tabs">
   229→            <button class="modal-tab active" onclick="switchTab(this, 'tab-csv')">CSV Upload</button>
   230→            <button class="modal-tab" onclick="switchTab(this, 'tab-url')">URL Scrape</button>
   231→            <button class="modal-tab" onclick="switchTab(this, 'tab-sample')">Sample Data</button>
   232→        </div>
   233→
   234→        <!-- CSV Tab -->
   235→        <div class="modal-tab-content active" id="tab-csv">
   236→            <form id="csv-form"
   237→                  hx-post="/upload"
   238→                  hx-encoding="multipart/form-data"
   239→                  hx-target="#csv-result"
   240→                  hx-indicator="#csv-spinner">
   241→
   242→                <div class="form-group">
   243→                    <label for="product_name">Product / Entity</label>
   244→                    <input type="text" id="product_name" name="product_name" placeholder="e.g., AcmeCo Widget Pro" required>
   245→                </div>
   246→
   247→                <div class="form-group">
   248→                    <label for="platform">Platform</label>
   249→                    <select id="platform" name="platform">
   250→                        <option value="">Auto-detect</option>
   251→                        <option value="Amazon">Amazon</option>
   252→                        <option value="Google Maps">Google Maps</option>
   253→                        <option value="G2">G2</option>
   254→                        <option value="Capterra">Capterra</option>
   255→                        <option value="Trustpilot">Trustpilot</option>
   256→                        <option value="Yelp">Yelp</option>
   257→                        <option value="App Store">App Store</option>
   258→                        <option value="Other">Other</option>
   259→                    </select>
   260→                </div>
   261→
   262→                <div class="file-drop" id="file-drop">
   263→                    <input type="file" id="file" name="file" accept=".csv" required>
   264→                    <div class="file-drop-content">
   265→                        <svg class="file-drop-icon" width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
   266→                            <path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/>
   267→                            <polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/>
   268→                            <line x1="12" y1="18" x2="12" y2="12"/>
   269→                            <polyline points="9 15 12 12 15 15"/>
   270→                        </svg>
   271→                        <p>Drop CSV here or <span class="browse-link">browse</span></p>
   272→                        <p class="file-hint">Columns: text/review, rating, date, author</p>
   273→                    </div>
   274→                    <div class="file-selected" style="display:none">
   275→                        <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--accent)" stroke-width="2">
   276→                            <path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/>
   277→                            <polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/>
   278→                        </svg>
   279→                        <span class="file-name"></span>
   280→                        <button type="button" class="file-clear" onclick="clearFile()">&times;</button>
   281→                    </div>
   282→                </div>
   283→
   284→                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">
   285→                    <span class="btn-text">Analyse Reviews</span>
   286→                    <span class="btn-spinner" id="csv-spinner" style="display:none">
   287→                        <span class="spinner"></span> Indexing...
   288→                    </span>
   289→                </button>
   290→
   291→                <div id="csv-result"></div>
   292→            </form>
   293→        </div>
   294→
   295→        <!-- URL Tab -->
   296→        <div class="modal-tab-content" id="tab-url">
   297→            <form id="scrape-form"
   298→                  hx-post="/scrape"
   299→                  hx-target="#scrape-result"
   300→                  hx-indicator="#scrape-spinner">
   301→
   302→                <div class="form-group">
   303→                    <label for="scrape-product">Product / Entity</label>
   304→                    <input type="text" id="scrape-product" name="product_name" placeholder="e.g., AcmeCo Widget Pro">
   305→                </div>
   306→
   307→                <div class="form-group">
   308→                    <label for="scrape-platform">Platform</label>
   309→                    <select id="scrape-platform" name="platform">
   310→                        <option value="">Auto-detect</option>
   311→                        <option value="Amazon">Amazon</option>
   312→                        <option value="Google Maps">Google Maps</option>
   313→                        <option value="G2">G2</option>
   314→                        <option value="Capterra">Capterra</option>
   315→                        <option value="Trustpilot">Trustpilot</option>
   316→                        <option value="Yelp">Yelp</option>
   317→                    </select>
   318→                </div>
   319→
   320→                <div class="form-group">
   321→                    <label for="url">Review Page URL</label>
   322→                    <input type="url" id="url" name="url" placeholder="https://..." required>
   323→                </div>
   324→
   325→                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-secondary">
   326→                    <span class="btn-text">Scrape &amp; Analyse</span>
   327→                    <span class="btn-spinner" id="scrape-spinner" style="display:none">
   328→                        <span class="spinner"></span> Scraping...
   329→                    </span>
   330→                </button>
   331→
   332→                <div id="scrape-result"></div>
   333→            </form>
   334→        </div>
   335→
   336→        <!-- Sample Data Tab -->
   337→        <div class="modal-tab-content" id="tab-sample">
   338→            <p class="upload-desc" style="margin-bottom:1rem">Load a pre-built dataset to explore ReviewLens without needing your own data.</p>
   339→
   340→            <form id="sample-form"
   341→                  hx-post="/sample"
   342→                  hx-target="#sample-result"
   343→                  hx-indicator="#sample-spinner">
   344→
   345→                <div class="form-group">
   346→                    <label for="sample-file">Dataset</label>
   347→                    <select id="sample-file" name="filename" required>
   348→                        <option value="" disabled selected>Choose a sample dataset...</option>
   349→                        {% for sf in sample_files %}
   350→                        <option value="{{ sf.filename }}">{{ sf.label }}</option>
   351→                        {% endfor %}
   352→                    </select>
   353→                </div>
   354→
   355→                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">
   356→                    <span class="btn-text">Load Dataset</span>
   357→                    <span class="btn-spinner" id="sample-spinner" style="display:none">
   358→                        <span class="spinner"></span> Loading...
   359→                    </span>
   360→                </button>
   361→
   362→                <div id="sample-result"></div>
   363→            </form>
   364→        </div>
   365→    </div>
   366→
   367→    <script>
   368→        var SESSION_ID = "{{ active_id or '' }}";
   369→    </script>
   370→    <script src="/static/app.js"></script>
   371→</body>
   372→</html>
   373→
